name_cn:
『Burberry』
Runway bowling bag, redesigned as a chic crossbody. Exterior: 100% cotton. Decoration: 100% calfskin. Interior: 100% calfskin. Removable crossbody strap. 1 exterior pocket; 1 interior pocket. Zipper closure. Hand-painted edges. Glossy metal hardware featuring the brand's Horseferry print, along with leather-wrapped lock and key.
Dimensions: 18 x 8 x 11cm
Strap vertical drop: 52cm
Model: 6888#
